## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security

## Validation

- [ ] Tests pass locally/CI
- [ ] Security impact reviewed
- [ ] Backward compatibility reviewed

## AI-Assisted Work (if used)

- [ ] AI assistance was used
- [ ] Output was reviewed and validated by a human
- [ ] No secrets or proprietary data leaked in prompts
